title: xyris neocaledonica
intro: Xyris neocaledonica, also known as the New Caledonia yellow-eyed grass, is a species of flowering plant native to New Caledonia and is a member of the family Xyridaceae. This plant has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly in its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Xyris neocaledonica include its ability to reduce inflammation, treat skin conditions, and even exhibit antifungal properties. The herbal preparations of this plant often involve infusions or decoctions of the leaves or roots, which can be consumed as teas or applied topically to the skin for its medicinal benefits.
